Title: Sicario: Day of the Soldado
Actors: Benicio Del Toro, Josh Brolin, Isabela Merced
Plot: In this adventure/drama, CIA agent Matt Graver (Josh Brolin) enlists a mysterious operative to help investigate a Mexican drug cartel that has been smuggling terrorists into the U.S. Things escalate when the daughter of a top kingpin is abducted, forcing Graver and his partner to re-evaluate their mission.
Language: English, Spanish, American Sign , Arabic, Somali, Spanish Sign
